phrases.text_local: Kde je muzeum v Chotěšovském paláci?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum entrance is inside the palace courtyard, not directly on the street.

likely_response.translation_en: From the courtyard, up the stairs.

responses.english: From the courtyard, up the stairs.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy synagogue tickets here?
phrases.text_local: Můžu si tady koupit lístky do synagogy?
phrases.cultural_note: The Great Synagogue is a major tourist site with its own ticket desk.
The brewery is a separate district; locals always refer to the 'areál' (complex).

likely_response.local: V areálu Prazdroje, u brány návštěvnického centra.
likely_response.translation_en: In the Prazdroj complex, at the visitor center gate.

responses.english: In the Prazdroj complex, at the visitor center gate.
responses.local: V areálu Prazdroje, u brány návštěvnického centra.

phrases.cultural_note: The main entrance is inside a building on the square, not a separate hole.

likely_response.local: Vchod je od náměstí, z pivovarského domu.
likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is from the square, from the brewery house.

responses.english: The entrance is from the square, from the brewery house.
responses.local: Vchod je od náměstí, z pivovarského domu.
